market.assumption: Austin has sufficient demand for chiropractic services
market.evidence: 127 practices in metro area, population growth 2.1% annually

market.assumption: Chiropractors are willing to pay for marketing services

channel.assumption: Facebook/Instagram are effective channels for reaching patients
channel.evidence: 70% have Facebook, 35% on Instagram, demographic match
Healthcare industry avg open rate 21%, response 3-5%
channel.test_method: Send 50 personalized emails, track response rate

offer.evidence: Low friction, high value, positions full service
offer.test_method: Launch landing page, drive 100 visitors, measure conversion

offer.evidence: Average patient LTV $1,200-2,400, need 2-3 patients to break even
offer.test_method: Pitch to 5 warm leads, gauge reaction

competitive.assumption: We can differentiate from other marketing agencies
competitive.evidence: Most practices use generic agencies, niche specialization rare
competitive.test_method: Analyze 5 competitor agency websites for positioning

timing.assumption: Q3 is good timing for campaign launch
timing.evidence: Back-to-school season, sports injuries increase, insurance resets
timing.test_method: Review historical Google Trends data for seasonality

validation_plan: Week 3: Launch tripwire landing page, drive traffic
Week 4: Pitch full service to 5 warm leads
